outlook.summary: Dealers are heavily long gamma across all expiries, creating a highly stable market pinned near the 0DTE Gamma Flip. Upside is strictly capped by heavy 0DTE Call walls at 724-725, while downside is protected by structural Put supports. Expect range-bound behavior with suppressed volatility.

levels.motivazione: Massive 0DTE Call OI (10.8k) and extreme volume (327k) creating a rigid resistance ceiling just above spot.

Massive Put OI concentration in both Weekly (78.6k) and Monthly (53.6k) expiries creating a structural floor.

Highest 0DTE Put OI (24.4k) providing a strong lower boundary and delta hedge support for market makers.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Subdued volatility expected; massive positive Total GEX suppresses large directional moves.
outlook.summary: Market makers hold massive positive gamma across all expiries (4.03B+), creating a strict pinning environment. Spot is trapped by heavy 0DTE Call OI and volume between 28100 and 28200. While the monthly expiration shows a bullish reverse-smirk, 0DTE holds a bearish smirk, balancing immediate directional risks. Expect mean-reverting price action around the 28150 volatility magnet.

levels.motivazione: Major 0DTE resistance with 120 OI and 1171 Vol. Positive GEX forces Market Makers to sell into rallies here.
levels.sintesiOperativa: SELL AREA: Strong Call Wall active

levels.motivazione: Highest 0DTE volume node (1947 Vol) directly at spot. Market makers will aggressively hedge to pin price at this strike.
Massive 0DTE Call OI (152) and Volume (2047). Positive GEX creates a strong delta-hedging floor just below spot.
Dominant Call Wall across both WEEKLY (147 OI) and MONTHLY (207 OI) expiries. Caps any macro upside expansions.
Aligns with 0DTE Max Pain and significant Put Volume (442 Vol), combined with heavy MONTHLY Call OI (257 OI).
